items.name_en: 🌟New Small Backpack
items.name_cn:
🌟New Small Backpack
This nylon backpack is part of Prada's classic design, embodying the brand's key traits: innovative materials, luxurious practicality, and a reinterpretation of classics. Crafted from Re-Nylon regenerated nylon derived from purified ocean plastic, it balances a modern look with a minimalist design, showcasing a stylish and elegant charm while remaining lightweight and practical.
Size: 23.5x28x12cm
Style: 1BZ677 Silver Buckle

items.name_en: 🌟Parachute Nylon Backpack
items.name_cn:
🌟Parachute Nylon Backpack
P's most classic, bestselling, and versatile backpack. Lightweight, rain-resistant, and with moderate capacity, it offers effortless styling for travel. Imported parachute fabric - waterproof and sun-proof. Front enamel logo with cross-grain calfskin trim. Drawstring inner pocket + two front zipper pockets. Meets the needs for refined storage.
Size: 28×23.5×12cm
Style: 1BZ677
